audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains no dynamic memory allocations whatsoever — no kmalloc, kzalloc, vmalloc, or equivalent calls exist. All three functions (nfp_net_tlv_caps_reset, nfp_net_tls_parse_crypto_ops, nfp_net_tlv_caps_parse) operate exclusively on caller-provided pointers and MMIO-mapped memory, so the universal quantifier over allocations ranges over an empty set and the property holds vacuously.
